tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "n32"

define i1 @lshr_x_by_const_cmp_x(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @lshr_x_by_const_cmp_x(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[TMP1]]
  %v = lshr i32 %x, 1
  %r = icmp eq i32 %v, %x
  ret i1 %r
}

target datalayout = "n32"

define <4 x i1> @lshr_by_const_cmp_sle_value(<4 x i32> %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @lshr_by_const_cmp_sle_value(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = icmp sgt <4 x i32> [[X:%.*]], <i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <4 x i1> [[R]]
  %v = lshr <4 x i32> %x, splat (i32 3)
  %r = icmp sle <4 x i32> %v, %x
  ret <4 x i1> %r
}

target datalayout = "n32"

define i1 @lshr_by_const_cmp_sge_value(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @lshr_by_const_cmp_sge_value(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[X:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
  %v = lshr i32 %x, 3
  %r = icmp sge i32 %v, %x
  ret i1 %r
}

target datalayout = "n32"

define i1 @sdiv_x_by_const_cmp_x(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_x_by_const_cmp_x(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[TMP1]]
  %v = sdiv i32 %x, 13
  %r = icmp eq i32 %v, %x
  ret i1 %r
}

target datalayout = "n32"

define i1 @udiv_x_by_const_cmp_x(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @udiv_x_by_const_cmp_x(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp sgt i32 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[TMP1]]
  %1 = udiv i32 %x, 123
  %2 = icmp slt i32 %1, %x
  ret i1 %2
}

target datalayout = "n32"

define i1 @ashr_x_by_const_cmp_sge_x(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @ashr_x_by_const_cmp_sge_x(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[X:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[R]]
  %v = ashr i32 %x, 5
  %r = icmp sge i32 %v, %x
  ret i1 %r
}

issue.author: zhengyang92

comments.author: Poseydon42
comments.body: I would like to work on this issue.

comments.author: zhengyang92
comments.body:
sdiv can be also replaced with lshr, udiv. slt/sgt can be replaced with ult/ugt.
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/iNBZVy https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/XA_HG5

issue.title: missed fold, x / c < x => x > 0
